headline: Is The Mosaic Company (MOS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is MOS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Mosaic Company on r/ValueInvesting by toutcas. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on MOS. The Mosaic Company’s share was trading at $22.90 as of June 18th. MOS’s trailing and forward P/E were 163.57 and 21.60 respectively according to Yahoo […]
